---
title: "{{title}}"
subtitle: "{{client}} ({{department}})"
author: "{{author}}"
date: today
date-format: long
format:
  docx:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r pkg}
library(here) # To generate relative file paths
library({{ table_engine }}) # Needed to display tables in Word

# Create list of captions
tot <- readRDS(here("data/tot/tot.rds"))
caption_list <- setNames(as.list(tot$caption), tot$name)

# Define function to add caption to tables
add_caption <- function(x, cap) {
  x |>
    gt::tab_caption(caption = NA) |>
    gt::tab_header(cap)
}
```

{{<pagebreak>}}
